revision.comment: Auto generating page. date placed far in the past so it is attributed to Immanuelle and FireflyBot sends them messages if it is ever imported to Wikipedia.
revision.text: #redirect[[en:Template:UF-adr]] <noinclude>[[Category:New automatic wikipedia redirects]]</noinclude><includeonly>[[Category:Erroneous transclusions of Template:UF-adr]]</includeonly>

{{Microformat message | format = adr | data = postal addresses or their component parts (regions, postal codes, country names, etc) | adr |country-name |extended-address |locality |postal-code |region |street-address }}<includeonly>{{sandbox other||[[Category:Templates generating ADR microformats]]}}</includeonly><noinclude> {{documentation}} </noinclude>

revision.comment: 1 revision imported: importing templates from wikipedia
revision.text: {{Microformat message | format = adr | data = postal addresses or their component parts (regions, postal codes, country names, etc) | adr |country-name |extended-address |locality |postal-code |region |street-address }}<includeonly>{{sandbox other||[[Category:Templates generating ADR microformats]]}}</includeonly><noinclude> {{documentation}} </noinclude>

revision.comment: 1 revision imported: importing redirects I created with chatGPT

revision.comment: Bot: tag as missing wikidata (no wikidata found via interwikis)
revision.text: {{Microformat message | format = adr | data = postal addresses or their component parts (regions, postal codes, country names, etc) | adr |country-name |extended-address |locality |postal-code |region |street-address }}<includeonly>{{sandbox other||[[Category:s generating ADR microformats]] [[sn:{{subst:PAGENAME}}]][[ja:{{subst:PAGENAME}}]] [[sn:{{subst:PAGENAME}}]] [[ja:{{subst:PAGENAME}}]] }}</includeonly><noinclude> {{documentation}} </noinclude> <noinclude>[[Category:Templates without wikidata]]</noinclude>

revision.comment: imported only latest revision from https://archive.org/details/miraheze-wiki-shintowiki-20251218 to avoid excessive disk usage, comment on the revision was Text replacement - "↵<noinclude>[[Category:Templates without wikidata]]</noinclude>" to ""
revision.text: {{Microformat message | format = adr | data = postal addresses or their component parts (regions, postal codes, country names, etc) | adr |country-name |extended-address |locality |postal-code |region |street-address }}<includeonly>{{sandbox other||[[Category:s generating ADR microformats]] [[sn:{{subst:PAGENAME}}]][[ja:{{subst:PAGENAME}}]] [[sn:{{subst:PAGENAME}}]] [[ja:{{subst:PAGENAME}}]] }}</includeonly><noinclude> {{documentation}} </noinclude>
